message:
⚡ perf: use Promise.any for mission lookups — resolve on first hit (#2906)

Promise.all still waited for all 13 directory lookups to settle even
with AbortController (abort saves bandwidth but not wall-clock time).
Promise.any resolves the instant the first path succeeds, cutting
mission load from ~2.4s to ~200ms.

Also bumps tsconfig lib to ES2021 for Promise.any support.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
